title: Experience
intro: Summarize your most relevant professional experience. Focus on responsibilities, collaboration, systems, and outcomes without using private employer details.

items.summary: A brief placeholder summary of this role, the team context, and the kind of work you were responsible for.

highlights.title: Workflow and delivery
highlights.description: Describe a representative responsibility, such as improving a workflow, supporting a team process, or helping deliver a system change.

highlights.title: Technical implementation
highlights.description: Describe a representative technical contribution, such as building a feature, maintaining a service, improving data quality, or automating a manual task.

highlights.title: Operations and support
highlights.description: Describe how you supported reliability, users, stakeholders, or operational handover in a practical working environment.
